info.title: OpenBuilt Register
info.description: Citizen-developer app builder for Nextcloud — compose apps from registers, connectors, workflows, and documents without code.

x-openregister.description: OpenBuilt register namespace. Hosts the Application + BuiltAppRoute control schemas, the ApplicationTemplate catalogue (spec #8), and the seed `hello-message` schema for the canonical hello-world virtual app.

Application.title: Application
Application.description: A virtual app built with OpenBuilt. Holds the manifest blob (per ADR-024) plus metadata and lifecycle. Rendered at runtime by mounting CnAppRoot with the manifest.

slug.description: Kebab-case slug; uniquely identifies the virtual app within its organisation. Drives the runtime path /builder/{slug}/*. Max 48 chars so the synthetic appId `openbuilt-{slug}` fits NC appId caps (per design.md OQ-4).

name.description: Human-readable name displayed in the OpenBuilt shell.

description.description: Optional long-form description of the virtual app.

owner.description: Nextcloud user id (UID) of the owner. Multi-user isolation: slug-collision checks scope to this field.

manifest.description: JSON manifest blob conforming to @conduction/nextcloud-vue/src/schemas/app-manifest.schema.json (v1.4.0+). Per ADR-024, this is consumed by useAppManifest + CnAppRoot at runtime.

version.description: Semver of this Application's manifest content. Bumped when the manifest changes substantively.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Driven by x-openregister-lifecycle below — not by direct writes.

templateOrigin.description: Reference to the ApplicationTemplate this application was cloned from (REQ-OBTC-007).

draft.description: Editable, not exposed via the manifest endpoint, not reachable at /builder/{slug}.

published.description: Exposed via GET /api/applications/{slug}/manifest, reachable at /builder/{slug}/*. The on_transition action upserts the corresponding BuiltAppRoute for fast slug → application lookup.

archived.description: No longer reachable. Preserved for restore. The on_transition action removes the BuiltAppRoute.

transitions.name: publish
transitions.description: Make the virtual app reachable at /builder/{slug}.

transitions.name: archive
transitions.description: Hide the virtual app without deleting it.

transitions.name: reopen
transitions.description: Restore an archived virtual app to draft for further editing.

transitions.name: republish
transitions.description: Restore an archived virtual app directly to published.

BuiltAppRoute.title: Built App Route
BuiltAppRoute.description: Index from slug → applicationUuid. Maintained by the Application lifecycle (upserted on publish, deleted on archive). Used by the runtime to resolve /builder/{slug} → manifest in a single OR lookup. Per ADR-022 this is an explicit flattened index rather than scanning the Application collection.

slug.description: Matches the Application slug. Unique within the organisation (enforced by lifecycle upkeep + 4xx on conflict).

applicationUuid.description: UUID of the published Application this route resolves to.

HelloMessage.title: Hello Message
HelloMessage.description: Seed schema for the canonical hello-world virtual app. Three sample messages are seeded on install so the install is testable out of the box.

ApplicationTemplate.title: Application Template
ApplicationTemplate.description: A pre-baked starter pack for building an Application from a recognisable use case — manifest plus companion schemas. Seeded Conduction-curated templates carry isSeeded: true. Per the hybrid register model this schema is shared across the `openbuilt` register; cloned user schemas land in a per-app `openbuilt-{slug}` register.

slug.description: Kebab-case unique slug for the template.

title.description: Human-readable title (plain English) shown in the gallery.

description.example: Municipal building-permit workflow with index, detail, form, and kanban pages.

useCase.description: Short one-line label describing the use case (plain English).

category.description: Top-level category used for filtering in the gallery.

screenshotUrl.description: Relative path under the app's img/templates/ folder, or an OR Files URL.

manifest.description: Full app-manifest JSON blob (ADR-024) to be deep-copied on clone.

companionSchemas.description: JSON-schema blobs to be cloned alongside the manifest into the user's per-app register (openbuilt-{slug}).

isSeeded.description: True for Conduction-shipped templates, false for org-local templates.

sourceUrl.description: Link back to the originating user-story / RFP / blog post for traceability.

version.description: Semver version of the template — recorded on clone for one-shot snapshot semantics.
